title: FoodData Central API Vocabulary
description: Key terms, concepts, and controlled vocabularies used in the USDA FoodData Central API.

terms.label: FDC ID
terms.definition: A unique integer identifier assigned to each food item in the FoodData Central database.

terms.label: Data Type
terms.definition: Indicates the category of food data. Controls which database the food originates from.

values.definition: Foods from FDA-regulated commercial products with label information submitted by manufacturers and brand owners.
Foods with extensive underlying nutrient and metadata. Generally whole, single-ingredient foods. Data derived from USDA laboratory analyses.
Foods and beverages from the USDA Food and Nutrient Database for Dietary Studies (FNDDS), used in the What We Eat in America dietary survey.
Foods from the Standard Reference database (SR28), the historical USDA reference for nutrient composition data.
Experimental food items not yet widely released.

terms.label: NDB Number
terms.definition: The USDA National Nutrient Database (NDB) identification number. Applies only to Foundation and SR Legacy foods.

terms.label: GTIN/UPC
terms.definition: Global Trade Item Number or Universal Product Code identifying a branded food product. Applies only to Branded Foods.

terms.label: Food Code
terms.definition: The 8-digit FNDDS food code that uniquely identifies a food within the Survey (FNDDS) data type.

terms.label: Nutrient Number
terms.definition: USDA nutrient identification number used to identify specific nutrients across all food types.

terms.label: Derivation Code
terms.definition: A code indicating how a nutrient value was derived or calculated.

commonValues.description: Calculated from a daily value percentage per serving size measure
Based on a recipe or formulation

terms.label: Response Format
terms.definition: Controls the verbosity of food item data returned by the API.

values.description: Returns all available data elements for the food item (default).
Returns a simplified set of elements suitable for listing and comparison.

terms.label: Branded Food Category
terms.definition: The product category of a branded food as defined by the GS1 food product category hierarchy.

terms.label: WWEIA Food Category
terms.definition: What We Eat in America (WWEIA) food category used to classify Survey (FNDDS) foods in dietary intake analysis.

terms.label: API Key
terms.definition: A free data.gov API key required for all requests. Can be passed as query parameter api_key or HTTP header X-Api-Key. The DEMO_KEY can be used for testing with reduced rate limits.
